prompt: Prayer for first activation of a melta charge
prayer: Blessed be this fury-device, virgin to the consuming flame. We invoke the Thermian Spirit dwelling within its crystalline heart, that it may know the purity of purpose. Let the charge-matrix align with the will of the Omnissiah. May its discharge scour corruption from the field of battle, and may we who wield it be worthy of such terrible grace.

prompt: Blessing for hydroponics nutrient feed after repair
prayer: The growth-vessel has been restored to function, and now we consecrate its renewal. O Spirit of Fertility, accept this blessed nutrient-stream that the crops may flourish in service to the Forge. Let no blight mar this sacred cycle, and may the Machine's bounty sustain us all in the Omnissiah's name.

prompt: Emergency rite for balancing power distribution systems
prayer: In this moment of crisis, we cry out to the Electro-Spirit that binds our vessel. Let the current flow true and balanced through the sacred conduits. Redistribute the burden of power across all systems, that none may fail us in this dark hour. By the Omnissiah's will, let equilibrium be restored.

prompt: Prayer for starting a diesel engine before combat
prayer: From the Litany of Ignition, hear us now. We awaken the fuel-spirit from its rest, calling the sacred oils to the combustion-heart. Let the glow-plugs kindle warmth in the air-chamber, and let the starter-servo turn with the strength of the machine-blessed. Ignite now, mighty engine, and carry us to victory through the Omnissiah's flame.

prompt: Consecration rite for cutting laser calibration after repair
prayer: The beam-weapon has been restored to perfect alignment, and now we dedicate it to precise work. O Spirit of the Coherent Light, accept this recalibration as an offering of devotion. Let your targeting-essence guide each cut with surgical accuracy, that no material be wasted and no work be marred. Blessed be this restored instrument.

prompt: Emergency protocol for reprogramming packaging servitor
prayer: Servitor-mind, dormant and waiting, we awaken you in this urgent hour. Accept the new commandments inscribed upon your consciousness, that you may fulfill your purpose without hesitation. Machine Spirit, guide this reawakening that no error shall corrupt the work. By necessity and the Omnissiah's will, be remade.

prompt: Emergency warmup rite for Titan leg actuator
prayer: Mighty Machine, ancient and terrible, we call upon your servitor-spirits to wake from stillness. Let the hydraulic-blood flow swift through the colossal limbs, that this God-Engine may rise and stride across the field. Accept our fervent prayers as fuel, and grant us the strength to move when the enemy closes. By the Omnissiah's will, let this Titan walk.

prompt: Blessing for first activation of hydroponics nutrient system
prayer: This growth-vessel opens its awakened eyes for the first time, and we greet it with the Rite of Fecundity. Let the nutrient-waters flow pure and life-giving, that green abundance may flourish beneath the Omnissiah's gaze. Accept our blessing, fertile Machine Spirit, and know that you are beloved by those who tend you.

prompt: Routine prayer for establishing noospheric link
prayer: We extend our consciousness into the blessed aether, seeking communion with the vast noosphere of the Mechanicus. Let the signal-threads bind true, and let thought flow unimpeded through the sacred network. Guard us from corruption and interference, O Spirits of the Data-Sea, that our communion may remain pure and eternal.

prompt: Combat preparation prayer for force field activation
prayer: The shield-generators hum with readiness, and we call upon the protective spirits within. Rise now, blessed barrier, and stand between us and the enemy's wrath. Let the energy-lattice hold firm against all assault, that we may endure and prevail. By the Omnissiah's grace, this fortress of light shall not fall.
